executor-api/package.json.summary: Package manifest for chatbot executor API with dependencies Express, ESLint, CORS, and Nodemon, scripts for start and dev modes, and engine requirement Node >=18.

executor-api/server.js.summary: A Node.js Express server providing authenticated POST endpoints for syntax checking and linting JavaScript files, using ESLint and a token from environment variable RAILWAY_AUTH_TOKEN.

index.html.summary: HTML entry point for a Self-Recursive Bot React application with mobile-responsive styles, import maps for React, ReactDOM, and Zustand libraries.

netlify.toml.summary: Netlify configuration defining build commands and edge function proxies for DeepSeek, OpenRouter, Firecrawl, LangSearch, executor, and GitHub token endpoints with CORS headers for a specific origin.

keywords.json.summary: A JSON file that indexes keywords and summaries for each code file, providing a structured metadata mapping of the project.

netlify/edge-functions/deepseek-proxy.js.summary: This Netlify Edge Function proxies POST requests to DeepSeek's chat completions API, supporting streaming (SSE) and non-streaming responses, with error handling and environment variable authentication.

netlify/edge-functions/executor-proxy.js.summary: This Netlify Edge Function proxies POST requests to a Railway backend service, dynamically routing based on URL suffix and including authentication via environment variables.

netlify/edge-functions/firecrawl-proxy.j.summary: This Netlify Edge Function proxies POST requests to the Firecrawl API for web searches, extracting and formatting results with titles, URLs, snippets, and domain names.

netlify/edge-functions/github-token-prox.summary: This Netlify Edge Function returns a GitHub Personal Access Token from environment variables via GET request, with CORS headers for cross-origin access.

netlify/edge-functions/langsearch-proxy..summary: This Netlify Edge Function proxies POST requests to the LangSearch API for web search, passing through the request body and handling errors.

netlify/edge-functions/openrouter-proxy..summary: A Netlify edge function that proxies POST requests to OpenRouter's chat completions API, handling authentication, streaming, error responses, and CORS.

netlify/inject-preview-bypass.js.summary: Injects a JavaScript snippet into index.html during Netlify deploy previews to hide the login gate and show the root element.

preferences.json.summary: Editable preferences JSON for a self-improving bot, specifying clarification prompts, planning rules, execution settings like ES6 modules, and review strictness.

src/components/SimpleChat.js.summary: A React component implementing a simple chat interface with message handling, run state tracking, token budget, and clarification queue for a self-improving bot.

src/components/SimpleChat/ChatPane.js.summary: A React subcomponent that renders chat messages in a scrollable pane with mobile-responsive styling and a run card when active.

src/components/SimpleChat/Header.js.summary: Defines a header component with inputs for repository and branch, adapting layout for mobile responsiveness.

src/components/SimpleChat/InputBar.js.summary: Renders an input bar for sending messages with a send button, handling Enter key and mobile layout.

src/components/SimpleChat/MessageList.js.summary: Displays chat messages with user/agent styling and automatic scrolling.

src/components/SimpleChat/RunCard.js.summary: Shows run state with collapsible sections for logs, files, tasks, and phase indicators.

src/components/SimpleChat/TaskList.js.summary: Lists tasks with colored status indicators and adaptive height for mobile.

src/components/SimpleChat/Toaster.js.summary: A simple React component that displays a fixed-position toast notification with a colored border indicating error or success.

src/core/SelfImprover.js.summary: Manages self-improvement workflow by setting up a run, executing cycles, and handling post-run actions with callbacks for logging, task updates, and progress.

src/core/WorkingMemory.js.summary: Stores gathered information during an agentic run, including file summaries and observations, to produce a compact prompt context for the LLM.

src/core/chunkedIndexer.js.summary: Processes repository files in groups to extract keywords and summaries, committing the resulting index back to the repo with robust JSON parsing.

src/core/execution/agenticExecutor.js.summary: Executes a task by loading target files, building execution prompts, applying edits programmatically, and verifying quality and commit.

src/core/execution/commitVerifier.js.summary: Re-reads a committed file to verify its SHA matches the expected SHA using GitHubService.loadFileContent, logging mismatches or failures.

src/core/execution/promptBuilder.js.summary: Builds the LLM prompt for the agentic executor by using ContextBuilder for smart file selection and injecting conversation memory, returning a prompt with SEARCH/REPLACE instructions.

src/core/execution/qualityGate.js.summary: Runs lint and syntax checks before commit, retries up to 2 times with LLM-generated SEARCH/REPLACE fixes for error severity 'error'.

src/core/execution/searchReplaceHandler..summary: Applies SEARCH/REPLACE or legacy update_editor blocks to build a fileMap ready for commit, with retry logic on failure.

src/core/fileDiscovery.js.summary: Discovers relevant files based on a goal by loading a keyword index (keywords.json) or falling back to filename scanning, scoring files by keyword hits and returning top matches.

src/core/goalVerifier.js.summary: Compares the feature-branch diff against the original goal using an LLM and returns achieved status with reason.

src/core/keywordIndexer.js.summary: Implements fuzzy matching for slash commands using Levenshtein distance and prefix matching to find the best command.

src/core/manifestManager.js.summary: Loads or builds a manifest.json from the repository by scanning JS files and parsing exports/imports.

src/core/manifestUpdater.js.summary: Incrementally updates manifest.json after code changes by re-parsing exports/imports and recomputing importedBy relationships.

src/core/orchestration/clarificationQueu.summary: Manages a clarification flow where questions are saved to memory, displayed via callback, and user answers resolve a Promise.

src/core/orchestration/cycleExecutor.js.summary: Runs the execute-and-review loop up to 3 cycles, executing tasks in parallel, reviewing results, and retrying on failure, with memory persistence between cycles.

src/core/orchestration/pauseController.j.summary: Provides a simple pause flag manager with methods to request, check, and reset the pause state.

src/core/orchestration/postRunActions.js.summary: Executes post-run actions after review passes, including manifest update, regression detection, goal verification, PR creation, and smoke testing.

src/core/orchestration/runSetup.js.summary: Handles pre-planning setup including conversation memory initialization, error ingestion for stack traces, loading preferences, creating a feature branch, and initializing working memory.

src/core/parallelExec.js.summary: Executes tasks from the queue in parallel with a max concurrency, using file locking to skip tasks that touch already locked files.

src/core/persistentMemory.js.summary: Saves/loads working memory to/from the repo, scoped by a runId to avoid overwrites between concurrent runs.

src/core/planner.js.summary: Creates a plan for a given goal by leveraging discovered context or file tree, and returns a JSON plan with tasks specifying exact file paths.

src/core/planning/agenticPlanner.js.summary: Performs iterative codebase exploration to plan changes, reading files until all candidates are processed or agent decides done.

src/core/planning/coordinatedPlanner.js.summary: Multi-agent plan creation that groups candidate files by directory, runs parallel exploration agents per directory, then merges summaries into a single plan.

src/core/planning/hierarchicalPlanner.js.summary: Extends planners with ability to decompose complex goals into sub-goals when the goal is deemed too complex.

src/core/planning/plannerFactory.js.summary: Factory that selects between coordinated and agentic planners based on discovery cache size and delegates to hierarchicalPlan.

src/core/prCreator.js.summary: Creates a pull request on GitHub with a title based on the goal and returns the PR URL.

src/core/regressionDetector.js.summary: Detects regressions by identifying files that import changed files and using an LLM to check if expected symbols still exist.

src/core/reviewer.js.summary: Reviews code changes by comparing original and committed versions, enforcing goal alignment, and reporting line-level issues.

src/core/taskQueue.js.summary: Manages a task queue with statuses and functions to initialize, get pending/done tasks, and mark tasks as done, failed, or todo.

src/core/taskQueueUtils.js.summary: Provides topologicalSort function for ordering tasks based on their dependencies using DFS and cycle detection via temporary marks.

src/main.js.summary: Main entry point that initializes React app, imports services (GitHub, LLM, executor, context builder, smoke test, self-improver) and sets up SelfImprover instance with workspace and provider configurations.

src/services/PreferencesService.js.summary: Loads and saves agent preferences from a preferences.json file in a GitHub repository, merging with defaults for clarification, planning, execution, and review settings.

src/services/conversationMemory.js.summary: Manages structured memory per repo and branch using localStorage, storing goal, phase, decisions, last action, open questions, and failed attempts for continuity across runs.

src/services/errorIngestion.js.summary: Parses JavaScript stack traces to extract file paths and line numbers, then builds a planner-friendly context string listing affected files with priority.

src/services/executorApi.js.summary: API class for making calls through Netlify edge proxy to Railway executor for linting and syntax checking, with fail-open behavior on network errors.

src/services/github.js.summary: Service class to interact with GitHub API for fetching repository file tree, loading file contents, and committing multiple files.

src/services/llmProvider.js.summary: Provider for language model completions via Netlify proxy with timeout handling, thinking mode support, and model selection.

src/services/smokeTest.js.summary: Smoke test class to poll a Netlify deploy preview URL until the page renders correctly with a root element, within a configurable timeout.

src/stores/providerStore.js.summary: Zustand store with persistence for managing AI provider selection, model, thinking mode, and reasoning effort settings.

src/stores/workspaceStore.js.summary: Defines a persistent Zustand store for workspace state including current repository, branch, GitHub token, and a flag to remember keys.

src/utils/agentSkills.js.summary: Parses AI replies to extract structured actions from legacy update_editor blocks and Aider-style SEARCH/REPLACE blocks, returning modified reply and an actions object.

src/utils/contextBuilder.js.summary: Builds a prompt context string by selecting target and related files from a manifest, respecting a token budget, and includes a ManifestBuilder class for dependency graph extraction.

src/utils/sandboxTest.js.summary: Tests code in a sandboxed iframe by dynamically importing services, injecting them into the iframe, and executing the code with a timeout and health check.

src/utils/searchReplace.js.summary: Implements SEARCH/REPLACE block application to file content with a matching cascade (exact then whitespace-flexible) and returns detailed errors for LLM feedback.

src/utils/stripComments.js.summary: Removes JavaScript and CSS comments (both block and line) and blank lines from code to reduce prompt size.
